thought.text: I see! This lexer is designed to read the token output from Task 1 (the clang format), not raw source code. So the Const token should already be handled if it's in the kClangTokens map. Let me try building again:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cmake --build build -t task2", "summary": "Build task2 with const token added"}

summary: Build task2 with const token added
